title: Audit ARC captures and privacy strings
description: Inspect closures/delegates for retain-cycle risk and Info.plist for required usage strings against the APIs used.
body: Use when reviewing memory and privacy hygiene. Actions: scan escaping closures, timers, delegates, and Combine subscriptions for strong self captures that form cycles, and cross-check the sensitive APIs the code calls (location, camera, photos, etc.) against Info.plist usage strings and App Privacy declarations. Report missing [weak self], strong delegates, and missing/incorrect usage strings with location. Do not modify code. This skill exposes capability only and must not access protected data without runtime permission. Validation signals include no obvious cycles and a usage string per sensitive API. Risk boundary: a missing usage string is a guaranteed crash and a strong capture cycle leaks the screen; both are blocking findings to fix before release.
